title: Add integration test for ccp9/ccp16 vectors using updated rf_health in gateway/meshtastic
description: Create or update test that loads ccp16.json / ccp15.json vectors, exercises RfHealthMetrics::adaptive_sf, record_*, should_rebalance across lichen-gateway and lichen-meshtastic paths. Verify exact match to expected SF/EMA/load_factor. Run as part of cargo test.
